precisionPolicy.x87Arithmetic: binary64 normalized with exact signed-zero, infinity, and NaN class
precisionPolicy.simdFloatingPoint: one ULP only for templates declaring rounding sensitivity
precisionPolicy.windowsBaselineAuthority: exact except templates 300 and 301 (Prism x87 deviations), templates 132 through 137 (the VM exposes no i386 BMI1), and templates 138 through 145 (the VM exposes no i386 BMI2); non-authoritative cases require exact interpreter/JIT parity plus the SDM expectation
precisionPolicy.bmi1Qualification: Windows rejected templates 132 through 136 and decoded template 137 as legacy BSF; all six attempted results are retained, independent SDM checks and exact interpreter/JIT parity pass, and SharpWine advertises BMI1 for macOS ARM64 compatibility
precisionPolicy.bmi2Qualification: Windows exited 255 for all eight directly attempted BMI2 templates 138 through 145; SharpWine's BZHI, PDEP, PEXT, MULX, SHLX, SHRX, SARX, and RORX pass independent semantic checks, exact interpreter/JIT parity, precise state and cross-page fault tests, a loaded multi-instruction guest-program witness, and the complete 65536-case replay, so BMI2 is advertised for macOS ARM64 compatibility
precisionPolicy.rdtscpQualification: Windows executes RDTSCP and returned TSC_AUX zero, but its host-derived timestamp is non-authoritative for SharpWine's deterministic policy; the GEM adapter returns the epoch-zero committed-retired counter with TSC_AUX zero, and prefixed-length, one-step, whole/split quantum, interpreter/JIT, CPUID, and both 65536-case golden replay gates pass

promotedRegressions.defect: x87 full-stack push failed to commit indefinite special state
SCAS subtraction operand order produced reversed arithmetic flags

qualificationBoundary: The accepted development evidence covers all 16 shards through shard 15 ordinal 4095.
